summary: Completed comprehensive testing of QLDB Dispute Ledger (PostgreSQL) integration. All 16 backend API tests pass (100%). Frontend dashboard working correctly with navigation, all 3 tabs functional, create dispute flow verified end-to-end. Stats update correctly after creating new disputes.
critical_code_review_comments: All QLDB endpoints properly return data with correct status codes
Dashboard stats accurately reflect database state (total_disputes, open_disputes, total_amount_disputed)
Nav link with data-testid='nav-ledger-link' navigates correctly to /qldb route
Create dispute form properly validates and submits data to backend
Audit trail correctly records all dispute creation events
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes for testing
Page title correctly updated to 'Dispute Ledger' (from AWS QLDB)
PostgreSQL backend connection is LIVE - using AWS Aurora PostgreSQL

success_rate.frontend: 100% (navigation, tabs, form submission, stats update all working)

seed_data_creation: Database contains 7 disputes after testing (3 original + 4 from pytest). Test disputes prefixed with 'TEST_' or 'UI_Test_'. Backend creates audit entries for each dispute creation.
context_for_next_testing_agent: QLDB Dispute Ledger (PostgreSQL) is fully functional. Access via /qldb route after login. Features tested: health check, dashboard stats, disputes list, dispute creation with persistence verification, audit trail, chain integrity verification. All data-testid selectors working: qldb-dashboard, tab-disputes, tab-audit, tab-create, create-dispute-form, submit-dispute-btn, refresh-dashboard-btn, nav-ledger-link. Stats cards show Open Disputes, Resolved Disputes, Total Amount Disputed.

health.test_health_endpoint: PASS - Returns healthy status with service name
health.test_dashboard_stats: PASS - Returns dispute_stats and audit_stats with accurate counts

disputes.test_list_disputes: PASS - Returns disputes array with pagination
disputes.test_create_dispute: PASS - Creates dispute with DISP-YYYY-XXXX format

audit.test_list_audit_entries: PASS - Returns entries array with pagination

dashboard.title: PASS - 'Dispute Ledger' title displayed
dashboard.stats_cards: PASS - Open Disputes (7), Resolved (0), Total Amount ($8,749.5)

disputes_tab.disputes_table: PASS - Shows 7 disputes with all columns
disputes_tab.table_columns: PASS - Dispute #, Title, Type, Status, Priority, Amount, Claimant, Created

audit_trail_tab.audit_stats: PASS - Audit Entries (7), Last 24h (7), Chain Verified (Yes)
audit_trail_tab.audit_table: PASS - Shows Event, Entity, Actor, Description, Timestamp columns

create_dispute_tab.form_fields: PASS - Title, Description, Type, Amount, Claimant Name, Claimant Email
create_dispute_tab.success_toast: PASS - 'Dispute created and recorded in ledger' shown
create_dispute_tab.stats_update: PASS - Open Disputes increased from 6 to 7 after creation

mocked_apis.note: All data comes from LIVE AWS Aurora PostgreSQL database - no mocking
